title: Redline Cyberware
description: A cyberware system for Palladium and KubeJS
body: Redline is a bare-bones, modular cybernetic enhancement tool for modpack makers that achieves full functionality with only Palladium and KubeJS. This core mod doesn't include any cybernetic components on its own. Instead, it offers a robust, data-driven system for content creators to develop their own cyberware items. Features: - Modular Operating System framework - Component slot management system - Cyberware load balancing - Palladium Powers integration - Data-driven configuration --- For Players: This is a framework mod - you'll need at least one content pack that adds cyberware operating systems and components. Check out compatible content packs such as the [Baseline Cyberware Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/baseline-cyberware). --- For Developers: Create your own cyberware using Redline's data-driven system. Add custom: - Operating Systems - Cybernetic Components - Palladium powers for all of them **All without needing to modify the core framework, and with minimal coding.** Check out the [Baseline Cyberware Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/baseline-cyberware) for an example. ~~
